title: ColorMixing Mod
description: ColorMixing | This mod will add color mixing to our game.
body:
# 🎨 Color Mixing

Intuitive dye crafting for Minecraft.
Tired of hunting rare flowers? Color Mixing is a lightweight, vanilla-friendly mod that lets you combine dyes directly in your crafting grid. It adds real-world logic to your game, making dye collection efficient and satisfying.

----
### ✨ Features

 * Logical Blending: Mix dyes like an artist (e.g., Blue + Yellow = Green).
 * Resource Efficient: Craft any color using only basic ingredients.
 * Vanilla Style: Fits perfectly into the standard gameplay experience.
 * Localization: Full support for English and Thai.
----  
### 🧪 Example Recipes
 * ⚫ Black + ⚪ White ➔ Gray
 * 🔵 Blue + 🟢 Green ➔ Cyan
 * 🔵 Blue + ⚪ White ➔ Light Blue
 * 🟡 Yellow + 🔵 Blue ➔ Green
 * 🔴 Red + 🟢 Green ➔ Brown
----
## The color combinations will differ between versions.
